overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hitman 3 showing Agent 47 in a white suit walking through a Mendoza winery estate during golden hour. The character moves from a wooden dock through lavender fields, enters a gated outdoor party, and descends into a modern interior lounge.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock with shacks and moored boats

agents.ego_description: walking along weathered wooden dock toward two men standing ahead near a shack

notable_agents.action: man in fishing gear standing on dock facing the water
man leaning against wooden shack wall with arms crossed

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming a narrow pier over water
rustic corrugated metal and wood structure with purple roof
small boat with outboard motor moored alongside the dock

segments.scene_description: Agent 47 walks along a narrow wooden dock flanked by moored boats and rustic wooden shacks. Two men stand ahead - one fishing and one leaning against a shack - as the character approaches and passes them, heading toward the dirt path leading inland.

scene_state.functional_zone: lavender field estate path with stone retaining walls

events.description: character ascends stone stairs between blooming lavender fields
passing a pedestrian in traditional dress walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking up winding dirt path through rolling lavender fields and ascending stone stairs toward a distant gate

notable_agents.action: woman in traditional dress walking down the path toward the camera

entered.detail: winding trail through the estate with tire tracks visible
extensive purple flowering plants covering rolling hills
dry stone retaining walls along the path edges
weathered stone steps ascending between lavender terraces
tall narrow evergreen trees lining the path
elaborate wrought iron entrance gate with stone pillars

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the dock behind and traverses a winding dirt path through expansive purple lavender fields bathed in golden hour light. He ascends weathered stone stairs flanked by tall cypress trees, passing another pedestrian as he approaches an ornate metal gate in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winery entrance courtyard with luxury cars and cactus gardens

events.description: passing through ornate metal gate from rural path to paved courtyard
entering crowded outdoor party area with white tents and bars

agents.ego_description: walking through the main gate into a paved courtyard with luxury cars and cactus displays, then approaching a crowded event

notable_agents.action: security guard in dark uniform standing near the gate entrance

entered.detail: cobblestone and tile surface with scattered leaves
dark green luxury convertible with tan interior
maroon sedan parked near stone wall
large terracotta pots containing tall cacti and succulents
large canvas tent structure visible beyond the courtyard

segments.scene_description: Agent 47 passes through an elaborate wrought-iron gate into a paved courtyard featuring parked luxury cars and large cactus planters. He continues toward a bustling outdoor event with white tents and guests visible ahead, transitioning from the natural landscape to a formal gathering space.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor wine tasting event with bars and buffet stations

events.description: navigating through dense crowd of formally dressed party guests

agents.ego_description: weaving through a crowded outdoor party with guests mingling near bars and buffet tables under white umbrellas

notable_agents.action: bartender in white shirt serving drinks at outdoor bar
group of guests in formal attire conversing under white umbrella

entered.detail: wooden bar counter with bottles and glassware
large canvas patio umbrella shading seating areas
long table with food displays and floral arrangements
wine barrel used as decorative table base

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a lively outdoor reception with numerous guests dressed in formal attire. White umbrellas shade buffet stations and bars while people mingle on the paved terrace, creating a festive atmosphere overlooking the vineyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern underground lounge with geometric architecture

events.description: descending spiral staircase from outdoor terrace to indoor area
entering large modern room with distinctive geometric ceiling

agents.ego_description: walking down a spiral staircase into a sleek modern interior and entering a large lounge area with geometric design elements

notable_agents.action: security guard in dark suit descending stairs ahead of the character

entered.detail: curved wooden staircase with decorative metal railings descending underground
dark wood paneling with ambient lighting
illuminated display showing exterior camera feed or artwork
intricate lattice pattern ceiling with warm lighting
spacious room with contemporary furniture and large windows
floor-to-ceiling glass overlooking the estate

segments.scene_description: Agent 47 descends a spiral staircase from the outdoor party into a sleek, modern interior space. He enters a spacious lounge featuring a dramatic geometric ceiling pattern, large digital screens, and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the vineyard estate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a rustic waterfront through natural landscapes and into a sophisticated, modern estate. It begins with Agent 47 walking along a narrow wooden dock past moored boats and fishing men before moving inland onto a winding dirt path. As the scenery shifts, the camera follows him through expansive purple lavender fields bathed in golden hour light, ascending stone stairs flanked by cypress trees toward an ornate metal gate. The scene then opens into a paved courtyard of luxury cars and cactus planters, flowing seamlessly into a bustling outdoor reception filled with formal guests and white umbrellas. Finally, the camera descends a spiral staircase, leaving the festive terrace behind to enter a sleek interior lounge characterized by a geometric ceiling and floor-to-ceiling windows overlooking the vineyard.
